name: Squid, Pork and Mushroom
steps: Add all the ingredients in a pan.
Bring to boil then remove from heat.
Leave 20 minutes to infuse the pass.
Heat pickle juice and pour over the mushrooms.
Leave to cool in the pickle juice.
Cut in half and layer up 5-6 layers high.
Cling film and pierce some holes for air to escape.
Vacuum pack in one direction and place in blast chiller.
Cut into thin strips and portion 20g.
